markdup_tool.description: Duplicate marking tool. 'gatk' uses GATK MarkDuplicates; 'bamsormadup' uses biobambam bamsormadup; 'sambamba' uses sambamba markdup; 'fastdup' uses FastDup (Picard-compatible, faster).

freebayes_region_splitter.description: How to split regions for Freebayes parallel region fan-out: fixed-size FASTA chunks ('fai'), BAI data-aware regions ('bai'), or coverage-balanced regions ('coverage').

freebayes_chunk_size.description: Chunk size passed to fasta_generate_regions.py for Freebayes population-mode sharding.

freebayes_cov_chunk.description: Target cumulative BAI-backed data size per region when freebayes_region_splitter is set to 'bai'.

freebayes_coverage_backend.description: Coverage backend used when freebayes_region_splitter is set to 'coverage'. 'sambamba' uses sambamba depth base directly across all staged BAMs. 'mosdepth' is a prototype path that converts mosdepth per-base intervals back into the coverage stream expected by the vendored Freebayes helper.

freebayes_coverage_regions.description: Target number of coverage-balanced regions to generate when freebayes_region_splitter is set to 'coverage'.

freebayes_max_chunks.description: Maximum number of Freebayes target regions allowed in the largest generated per-chromosome region file. The workflow aborts if this limit is exceeded so chunk sizes can be increased before fan-out creates too many tiny tasks.

freebayes_args.description: Additional arguments passed to Freebayes. Includes --genotype-qualities by default so GQ fields are emitted for downstream filtering, plus --use-best-n-alleles 4 as a conservative performance guard in problematic low-complexity or ultra-high-coverage regions.

mask_hetero.description: Mask heterozygous genotypes during filtering. Requires diploid variant calling (--ploidy 2).

popgen.description: Run population genetics analyses (PCA + phylogenetic tree) from the population VCF and add them to MultiQC.

popgen_tree_method.description: Tree construction method for the population genetics module (distance-based: upgma/nj; model-based: ml/bayesian).

popgen_legend_order.description: Population legend order in popgen plots. 'samplesheet' keeps first-seen order from input table.
